features: Nourishing 300ml hand wash gently cleanses hands
Luxury 300ml hand & body Lotion to moisturise and delicately fragrance the hands
Baylis & Harding's new Midnight Cherry fragrance
description: Product Description This luxurious 300ml hand wash and 300ml moisturising hand & body lotion will look perfect next to any sink. All beautifully fragranced with our new Midnight Cherry scent. Indulge in a decadent symphony of senses. This opulent fragrance opens with a tantalizing burst of tart, sour cherry, followed by a sophisticated liquor and a rich, creamy almond accord, leaving a lingering trail of luxurious elegance. Beautifully presented with sumptuous red tones accented with soft pink and bursts of firework luxe gold detailing, this collection is the perfect gift for a pop of party glamour this festive season. A seductive and enchanting blend, Midnight Cherry captures the essence of mystery and allure with its rich and decadent notes. Ingredients HAND WASH: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Coumarin, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin.HAND & BODY LOTION: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Benzaldehyde, Benzyl Benzoate, Coumarin, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Trimethylcyclopentenyl Methylisopentenol, Vanillin. Directions Hand Wash - Lather And Rinse. Hand & Body Lotion - Massage Gently Into Skin Until Fully Absorbed. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Baylis & Harding Plc, B98 7AS, England. RP. MSL, Suite 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin, IE. See more
